ENCOUNTERFORGE.Title: Encounter Forge
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Dialog.Title: Encounter Forge
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Dialog.Name: Name
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Notify.Error: Encounter Forge: Failed to generate encounter. See console for details.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Dialog.SoloHint: Locks to 1 enemy. Boosts HP and AC, guarantees legendary traits and actions.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Settings.FolderHint: Folder name for generated actors. Created automatically if it does not exist. Leave blank to place actors in the root.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Settings.RememberHint: Saves dialog field values between sessions.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Settings.ResetHint: Clears any saved dialog values and restores defaults.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Settings.ResetConfirmBody: Clear all saved values and restore dialog defaults?
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Dialog.CalibrateHint: Uses the selected party's actual stats instead of generic estimates based on player count and level.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Dialog.NoPlayerActors: No player-owned actors found. Calibration will use generic party estimates.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Dialog.DerivedFromParty: Derived from the selected party actors
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Results.Title: Encounter Results
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Results.Subtitle: Estimated outcomes based on the generated creatures.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Title: Export Custom Content
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Subtitle: Export this item's stats into Encounter Forge's randomization pools.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.SourceMissing: The original item could not be found. You can still edit this entry, but ReSync will not be able to pull updated stats.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Name: Name
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.Kind: Chooses whether this entry is drawn from the trait pool or the action pool when generating creatures.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.TraitCategory: Groups this trait (e.g. Defensive, Movement, Legendary) so it's matched to creatures that need that kind of trait.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.ActionCategor: Groups this action (e.g. Melee, Ranged, Special) so it's matched to creatures that need that kind of action.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.Tags: Restricts this entry to creatures matching one of these themes. Leave everything unchecked, or only check Any/Unknown, to allow it for any creature.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.CRRange: Limits which creature challenge ratings can roll this entry. Leave blank for no limit.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.CRAdjustment: Added to a creature's effective CR when this trait is chosen, representing how much stronger it makes the creature.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.LegendaryType: Marks this trait as a Legendary Action, Lair Action, or Legendary Resistance, used when generating Solo Boss creatures.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.LegendaryCost: How many legendary action points this trait costs to use.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.ResistanceUse: How many times per day this Legendary Resistance can be used.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.ActionType: How this action resolves (melee/ranged weapon or spell attack, saving throw, or no-damage utility). Used to estimate the creature's damage per round.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.Range: Maximum range in feet, used to decide whether ranged creatures can be given this action.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.Damage: Used to estimate this action's damage-per-round contribution when balancing the encounter.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.ChassisAffini: Limits this action to creatures built on these chassis types (e.g. Brute, Skirmisher). Leave Any checked to allow all chassis.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.School: The spell's school of magic, shown for reference and used when filtering spells.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.Cantrip: Marks this as a cantrip, usable at any character level without expending a spell slot.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Export.Hint.SpellTier: Limits which spell slot tiers can roll this spell.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.CustomContent.Title: Custom Content
ENCOUNTERFORGE.CustomContent.Subtitle: Manage items exported into Encounter Forge's randomization pools.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.CustomContent.Empty: No custom content exported yet. Use the export button on an item's sheet to add entries here.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.CustomContent.ReSyncToolt: Edit the original item in Foundry, then click ReSync to pull its latest description and stats into this entry.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.CustomContent.ExportHint: Download all of this world's custom content as a JSON file, so you can share it or import it into another world.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.CustomContent.ExportEmpty: Encounter Forge: No custom content to export yet.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.CustomContent.ImportHint: Load a previously exported JSON file. Its entries are added to this world's custom content pools alongside what's already here.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.CustomContent.ImportSucce: Encounter Forge: Imported {count} custom content entries.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.CustomContent.ImportEmpty: Encounter Forge: The selected file contained no custom content entries.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.CustomContent.ImportError: Encounter Forge: Failed to import that file. Make sure it's a JSON file exported from Encounter Forge's Custom Content manager.
ENCOUNTERFORGE.Settings.CustomContentHin: View, enable/disable, ReSync, or delete items exported into Encounter Forge's randomization pools.
